props.message: Chào mừng bạn đến với Bella Rosa! Giảm ngay 10% cho đặt bàn trước.

props.heading: Authentic Italian Flavors in the Heart of the City
props.subtext: Experience the warmth of Italy with our hand-crafted pasta, wood-fired pizzas, and curated wine selection.

props.heading: The Bella Rosa Experience
props.subtext: We combine tradition with fresh, local ingredients to create unforgettable dining moments.

features.title: Hand-Crafted Pasta
features.description: Our pasta is made fresh daily by our chefs, ensuring the perfect texture in every bite.

features.title: Wood-Fired Pizza
features.description: Authentic Neapolitan-style pizzas baked to perfection in our traditional wood-fired oven.

features.title: Chef-Curated Wine List
features.description: Explore our extensive collection of Italian wines, hand-picked to complement your meal.

testimonials.quote: The truffle risotto was the best I have had outside of Italy. Our anniversary dinner here was truly unforgettable.
testimonials.author: Michael Torres

testimonials.quote: An incredible atmosphere paired with authentic flavors. It is my go-to spot for business dinners.
testimonials.author: Sarah Jenkins

testimonials.quote: The staff made us feel so welcome. You can taste the passion in every single dish.
testimonials.author: David Nguyen

props.heading: Experience Fine Dining at Its Best
props.subtext: Book your table today and enjoy a complimentary appetizer on your first visit.

props.heading: Get in Touch
props.subtext: We would love to host you. Fill out the details below to secure your reservation.

props.description: Bringing the heart and soul of Italian cuisine to your table with every dish we serve.
